THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS DENNIS AND CINDY YU HAN ZAI ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION, REPRESENTED BY BENITA SELOR, STATE FARM INSURANCE, IS PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DEBRA NICHOLSON, REPRESENTED BY ROBERT NICHOLSON, EXECUTOR TO THE ESTATE OF DEBRA NICHOLSON IS PRESENT. MR. NICHOLSON REPRESENTS THAT PLAINTIFF DEBRA NICHOLSON IS DECEASED AND HE IS THE EXECUTOR OF PLAINTIFFS ESTATE. DEFENDANTS DENNIS YU HUN ZAI, CINDY YU HUN ZAI AND STATE FARM REPRESENTED BY AMBER FRELICHE, CLAIMS SPECIALIST ARE PRESENT. THE COURT ON IT'S OWN MOTION CONTINUES THIS MATTER TO ALLOW MR. ROBERT NICHOLSON TO FILE AN SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF DEBRA NICHOLSON AS WELL AS TO PROPERLY FILE HIS REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
